hero.gameBegins: The Game is About to Begin
hero.subtitle: Para cada jogador que espera ser visto, cada torcedor pronto para pertencer e cada clube em busca da próxima estrela, a espera acabou. Stratos conecta jogadores, fãs e clubes em todo o mundo.
hero.limitedAccess: Acesso limitado. Somente convite. Cadastre-se agora

story.title: The Game Changer
story.subtitle: Leveling the Playing Field
story.description: Stratos bridges the gap between grassroots and PRO; unlocking access, visibility, and opportunity at a global scale.

players.title: For Players
players.body: Build your digital identity, showcase your talent, and unlock opportunities beyond your local pitch.

fans.title: For Fans
fans.tagline: More than spectators– be part of the journey.
fans.body: Support rising talent, engage deeper with the game, and shape the future of football.

clubs.title: For Clubs
clubs.tagline: See what others can't. Recruit the best.
clubs.body: Discover and scout global grassroots talent with clarity, speed, and precision without borders or limitations.

what.title: What is Stratos?
what.subtitle: Every Part of the Game. Connected.
what.description: Stratos is building a system that makes football talent discovery global, meritocratic, and accessible to any player anywhere.
what.card1Body: Own your profile. Control your journey.
what.card2Body: Smarter decisions, safer interactions, better outcomes.
what.card3Body: Find and be found from anywhere in the world.
what.card4Body: A network of supporters empowering dreams.

movement.title: The Stratos Movement
movement.subtitle: One Global FOOTBALL Ecosystem
movement.description: Built across continents. Connected as one ecosystem. Powering the world's biggest game.
movement.alternative: Alternatively: 2,847+ Athletes discovered | 38 Partner clubs and academies | 12 Countries and counting
movement.regions: Africa | South America | Asia | Europe | North America

waitlist.playersTitle: Players: Be First to Go PRO.
waitlist.playersBody: Early access. Exclusive drops. Priority onboarding.
waitlist.fansTitle: Fans: Be First to Support the PRO.
waitlist.fansBody: Support rising talent and engage deeper with the game.
waitlist.clubsTitle: Clubs: Get Access to Star Players.
waitlist.clubsBody: Discover global grassroots talent with precision.

footer.description: Stratos is building the infrastructure for global football, starting from the grassroots.

waitlist.title: Junte-se à lista de espera
waitlist.description: Be among the first to experience the future of football.
